deep_dive.title: Fourier Neural Operators with Least-Squares Readout Refit for Learning Random Obstacle-to-Solution Maps
deep_dive.abstract: We study operator learning for random obstacle-to-solution maps arising from elliptic variational inequalities with finite-band self-affine random obstacle fields. Instead of introducing an explicit truncated stochastic parametrization of the random input, we learn the map directly from sampled obstacle realizations on a fixed grid. This problem is challenging because the solution is governed not only by the obstacle field itself, but also by the induced contact set and free-boundary geometry. We introduce a post-training least-squares readout refit for the Fourier neural operator (FNO). After the FNO is trained end to end, its nonlinear backbone is frozen and the final affine readout is recomputed by solving the induced linear least-squares problem over all training samples and grid points. The refit yields the empirical squared-error optimal readout for the learned frozen features while leaving the nonlinear representation unchanged. We compare vanilla DeepONet, POD-DeepONet, a two-stage DeepONet baseline, FNO, and FNO with least-squares readout refit (FNO-LS) on two obstacle ensembles with different amplitude levels. Numerical results show that FNO-LS achieves the strongest overall performance among the tested models, particularly for higher-amplitude obstacles with more complex contact geometry. The method improves average field accuracy, contact-set recovery, and obstacle-violation metrics at low additional cost, especially when the FNO backbone is informative but not fully converged. These results suggest that least-squares readout refit is a simple and effective post-training enhancement for learning random obstacle-to-solution maps.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Fourier Neural Operator for learning obstacle-to-solution maps
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 傅里叶神经算子学习障碍到解的映射
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子学习障碍到解的映射
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子学习障碍到解的映射
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a post-training least-squares readout refit for Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) to learn random obstacle-to-solution maps, improving accuracy on free-boundary problems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对非光滑随机障碍问题，提出了一种结合最小二乘读出重拟合的傅里叶神经算子方法。通过学习障碍场到解的映射，避免了显式随机参数化。后训练阶段冻结非线性主干，重计算仿射读出层，提高了算子的泛化能力。尽管应用于固体力学，其算子学习框架可直接迁移到空气污染传输模型的代理建模。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对非光滑随机障碍问题，提出了一种结合最小二乘读出重拟合的傅里叶神经算子方法。通过学习障碍场到解的映射，避免了显式随机参数化。后训练阶段冻结非线性主干，重计算仿射读出层，提高了算子的泛化能力。尽管应用于固体力学，其算子学习框架可直接迁移到空气污染传输模型的代理建模。

deep_dive.title: Scaling Storm-Resolving Atmospheric AI Simulation to the Entire Planet
deep_dive.abstract: Kilometer-scale convection shapes precipitation extremes, tropical organization, and cloud feedbacks, but most global atmospheric models approximate these processes at 25-100 km resolution. Global storm-resolving physics models resolve convective systems explicitly, but at a cost -- roughly one MWh per simulated day on exascale supercomputers -- that limits long-duration simulation. We introduce STRATA (Storm-resolving Tile-based autoRegressive Atmosphere Transformer Architecture), the first autoregressive AI emulator for global storm-resolving atmospheric dynamics. STRATA is trained on the highest-resolution atmospheric dataset yet used for global AI emulation: 17 days of SCREAM physics-model output at 4.9-km resolution (~25 million grid cells) sampled every 10 minutes. Our central premise is that on 10-minute timescales atmospheric dynamics are predominantly local, so training on small spatial tiles trades scarce global temporal samples for abundant local spatial samples and enables global rollout via overlapping-tile blending. STRATA combines 3D patch embedding and local 3D neighborhood attention, a novel Stereographic Rotary Position Embedding (StereoRoPE) for grid-invariant encoding, and a pixel-space de-aliasing decoder that suppresses patch-scale rollout artifacts. An iso-FLOP scaling study reveals that km-scale emulation requires ~10x more FLOPs per grid point than coarse-resolution AI weather models, consistent with the higher information density of convective-scale dynamics. Trained on only 17 days of data, STRATA produces stable 24-hour global rollouts with realistic km-scale dynamics across diverse regimes, though large-scale biases develop with lead time. It achieves 48 simulation days per megawatt-hour -- about 50 times better energy efficiency than the SCREAM physics model -- and 741 simulated days per wall-clock day at 512 H100 GPUs. Code and dataset are publicly available.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: AI emulator for storm-resolving global atmosphere
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于AI的全球风暴分辨大气仿真器
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于AI的全球风暴分辨大气仿真器
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于AI的全球风暴分辨大气仿真器
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces STRATA, an autoregressive AI emulator for global storm-resolving atmospheric dynamics trained on 4.9-km SCREAM data.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 全球风暴分辨物理模型计算量巨大（每日约1兆瓦时），限制长期模拟。本文提出STRATA，首个自回归AI仿真器，在4.9公里分辨率、2500万网格的SCREAM数据上训练，首次实现全球风暴分辨大气动力学的AI仿真。STRATA能够以远低于物理模型的计算成本再现关键天气过程，是代理模型加速大气模拟的重要突破，与需求中的模型加速主题紧密相关。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 全球风暴分辨物理模型计算量巨大（每日约1兆瓦时），限制长期模拟。本文提出STRATA，首个自回归AI仿真器，在4.9公里分辨率、2500万网格的SCREAM数据上训练，首次实现全球风暴分辨大气动力学的AI仿真。STRATA能够以远低于物理模型的计算成本再现关键天气过程，是代理模型加速大气模拟的重要突破，与需求中的模型加速主题紧密相关。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 机器学习加速空气质量与化学传输模型, especially work that connects or combines: air quality model; CMAQ model air quality simulation; chemical transport model air pollution; physics-informed machine learning for environmental modeling; neural operator surrogate model; surrogate model air quality; deep learning methods for PM2.5 ozone air quality forecasting bias correction and data assimilation; CMAQ WRF CMAQ model acceleration GPU air quality simulation; physics informed neural operators for atmospheric transport advection diffusion and mass conservation; machine learning surrogate models for chemical transport and air quality models.

quick_skim.title: Scalable Operator Learning via Nyström Approximation With Denoising Applications
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we study Nyström subsampling for vector-valued regression in vector-valued reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces. Standard kernel methods often suffer from prohibitive computational costs due to the construction and inversion of large kernel matrices, which limits their scalability to large datasets. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose an efficient operator learning algorithm based on Nyström subsampling that accommodates functional outputs. Under general source conditions characterized by index functions-extending beyond the classical Hölder-type and operator-monotone frameworks-we establish minimax-optimal convergence rates for the proposed estimator. As an application of the proposed framework, we consider function denoising problems. Unlike classical denoising methods, which are typically tailored to specific signal representations or noise models, our approach formulates denoising within a general operator learning framework. Numerical experiments on signal denoising, real-time audio denoising, image denoising, inverse Radon transform reconstruction, and energy-efficiency prediction confirm that the proposed method achieves performance comparable to full kernel methods while substantially reducing computational cost.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: scalable operator learning via Nystrom approximation, relevant to surrogate model development
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于Nyström近似的可扩展算子学习，与代理模型开发相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于Nyström近似的可扩展算子学习，与代理模型开发相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于Nyström近似的可扩展算子学习，与代理模型开发相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Nyström subsampling for vector-valued regression yields scalable operator learning with minimax-optimal rates, applicable to function denoising and surrogate modeling.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出基于Nyström子采样的可扩展算子学习算法，用于向量值回归，避免了传统核方法的大矩阵构造和求逆。在一般源条件下建立了极小极大最优收敛率，并将去噪作为应用实例。该算法可处理函数输出，适用于物理模拟中替代昂贵数值模型的代理算子学习，如空气质量模拟中的代理模型构建。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出基于Nyström子采样的可扩展算子学习算法，用于向量值回归，避免了传统核方法的大矩阵构造和求逆。在一般源条件下建立了极小极大最优收敛率，并将去噪作为应用实例。该算法可处理函数输出，适用于物理模拟中替代昂贵数值模型的代理算子学习，如空气质量模拟中的代理模型构建。

quick_skim.title: A Bayesian latent Gaussian process framework for aerodynamic uncertainty quantification
quick_skim.abstract: Predicting the aerodynamic performance (e.g. lift, drag, and moment coefficients) of an aircraft is challenging -- computational models are biased and direct simulations are prohibitive. A pragmatic way to overcome this limitation is by calibrating low-fidelity computational predictions with experimental measurements. This, however, requires calibrating against \emph{sparse} measurements contaminated with \emph{uncertainty} in both the control inputs and the measured aerodynamic response. We develop a methodology to address this problem based on Gaussian process surrogates and the classical Kennedy-O'Hagan calibration. A surrogate model learned on abundant-but-cheap low-fidelity data is calibrated with a sparse set of measurement data. Crucialy, we develop a Bayesian latent Gaussian process based approach that marginalizes the calibrated surrogate model over the input uncertainty, while also matching the marginal mean and variance of the measured output uncertainty. Once calibrated, our surrogate model predicts the uncertainty in aerodynamic coefficients with very high accuracy, including at extrapolative input settings. We validate our calibrated surrogate model predictions against measurement data with \emph{true} uncertainty intervals to demonstrate that the model places $94.2-95.8\%$ of its predictive samples inside the released $95\%$ truth intervals, with endpoint cumulative probabilities very close to the nominal 0.025 and 0.975 levels.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Gaussian process surrogate framework for aerodynamic uncertainty with Kennedy-OHagan calibration
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 高斯过程代理框架用于气动不确定性，结合Kennedy-OHagan校准
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 高斯过程代理框架用于气动不确定性，结合Kennedy-OHagan校准
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 高斯过程代理框架用于气动不确定性，结合Kennedy-OHagan校准
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Develops a Bayesian Gaussian process surrogate framework for aerodynamic uncertainty, calibrating low-fidelity models with sparse experimental data using Kennedy-OHagan approach.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对气动性能预测中计算模型偏差和实验数据稀疏的问题，提出贝叶斯高斯过程代理模型框架，利用Kennedy-OHagan校准方法结合低保真度和稀疏高保真数据。该方法能有效量化不确定性，提高预测可靠性，其思想可迁移至空气质量模型替代与校准。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对气动性能预测中计算模型偏差和实验数据稀疏的问题，提出贝叶斯高斯过程代理模型框架，利用Kennedy-OHagan校准方法结合低保真度和稀疏高保真数据。该方法能有效量化不确定性，提高预测可靠性，其思想可迁移至空气质量模型替代与校准。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: machine learning surrogate models for chemical transport and air quality models

quick_skim.title: Scalable coarse-to-fine spatial downscaling
quick_skim.abstract: This study proposes coarse-to-fine downscaling (CF-DS), a scalable spatial downscaling method extending coarse-to-fine spatial modeling. Unlike conventional spatial-statistical downscaling methods such as area-to-point kriging, CF-DS does not require covariance matrix inversion or likelihood evaluation. Instead, it represents latent spatial processes through the synthesis of multi-scale local models, substantially reducing computational cost while approximately satisfying the aggregation constraint. Monte Carlo experiments show that CF-DS achieves predictive accuracy comparable to area-to-point kriging with dramatically shorter computation times, particularly for large datasets. An application to downscaling electricity consumption in the Tokyo metropolitan area further demonstrates its practical usefulness. The results suggest that CF-DS provides an efficient alternative for large-scale spatial downscaling problems. CF-DS is implemented in an R package spCF (https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/spCF/index.html).
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: spatial downscaling method applicable to air quality model output
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 空间降尺度方法，可应用于空气质量模型输出
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 空间降尺度方法，可应用于空气质量模型输出
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 空间降尺度方法，可应用于空气质量模型输出
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Coarse-to-fine downscaling (CF-DS) is a scalable spatial downscaling method that avoids large matrix inversion, achieving accuracy comparable to kriging with much lower cost.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出粗到细降尺度方法（CF-DS），一种可扩展的空间降尺度技术，避免了传统克里金方法中的协方差矩阵求逆。通过多尺度局部模型合成，在大数据集上显著降低了计算时间，同时保持与面积到点克里金法相当的预测精度。案例演示展示了其在电力消费数据上的应用，该方法可直接推广到空气质量模型输出的降尺度。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出粗到细降尺度方法（CF-DS），一种可扩展的空间降尺度技术，避免了传统克里金方法中的协方差矩阵求逆。通过多尺度局部模型合成，在大数据集上显著降低了计算时间，同时保持与面积到点克里金法相当的预测精度。案例演示展示了其在电力消费数据上的应用，该方法可直接推广到空气质量模型输出的降尺度。
